prs.title: Small refactor of canonicalization tests
Add more canonicalization rules for deprecated utilities
Make upgrade tooling more stable
Use `--placeholder-color` instead of `--background-color` for `placeholder-*` utilities
Collapse more utilities by expanding their declarations
fix(canonicalize): collapse arbitrary values into shorthand utilities
Fix crash due to invalid characters in candidate
Add canonicalizations for `tracking-*` utilities
Fix canonicalization resulting in empty list
Improve canonicalization for bare values exceeding default spacing scale suggestions
Cleanup inconsistencies related to (regex) escapes
fix(vite): resolve tsconfig paths in CSS and JS resolvers
fix: remove unused braces dependencies
Add `--stream` flag to `canonicalize` subcommand
Add support for Vite 8 in `@tailwindcss/vite`
Fix internal source map warnings
Add `tailwindcss canonicalize` sub-command
Canonicalize `calc(var(--spacing)*…)` expressions into `--spacing(…)`
fix(vite): skip full reload for server only modules scanned by client css
Extract classes from interpolated expressions in Ruby
fix(canonicalize): handle utilities with empty property maps in collapse
Guard object lookups against inherited prototype properties
Fix webpack loader cache key for resource queries
Fix missing extracted classes in mdx files
Correct CHANGELOG to mention inset not inline
Allow trailing dash in functional utility names
docs: update package README CI badge to main
Allow multiples of `.25` in `aspect-*` fractions
Add '.jj' to ignored content directories
docs: fix GitHub links to tailwindlabs org
Fallback to `config.createResolver` for `client` and `ssr` environments in `@tailwindcss/vite`
fix(canonicalize): prevent collapse cache pollution across calls
fix: restore full page reload for watched external files on Vite 7.1+
Fix/misc docs and tests
Fix Tailwind CSS package README GitHub links
Fix README links to use main branch
Fix README license badge link
Fix infinite loop when using `@variant` inside `@custom-variant` that points to another `@custom-variant`
Improve performance in bigger projects
Add mauve, olive, mist, and taupe color palettes
feat: handle backslash in `@utility` name
Simplify logical sizing utility theme namespaces
Add `font-features-*` utility for font-feature-settings
Improve walk performance
Add logical inset utilities (inset-s, inset-e, inset-bs, inset-be)
Add logical sizing utilities (inline-size, block-size)
[tailwindcss-vite] Add Register dependency messages logline
Add @tailwindcss/webpack loader for Tailwind CSS v4
Add logical block-start/block-end border, margin, and padding utilities
chore: Update outdated GitHub Actions versions
Fix class extraction for Rails' strict locals
Improve `@utility` name validation
Fix typo in comment
chore: fix some typos in comments
Detect utilities when containing capital letters followed by numbers
Allow whitespace around `@source inline()` arg
Clarify the `replaceAlpha` function comment
Do not wrap `color-mix` in a `@supports` rule if one already exists
CLI: Emit comment when source maps are saved to files
Fix failing `postcss` integration test
Release v4.1.18
Fix provenance setup for v3
Don’t try reading from pipes or special file descriptors
Don’t emit color-mix fallback rules inside `@keyframes`
Only use the last value when parsing duplicate cli arguments
Fix formatting of path in README.md
Expose `candidatesToAst` to the language server
Fix invalid template tags in tests
Validate named values in candidate parser
Canonicalization: combine `text-*` and `leading-*` classes
Don't inline all env vars in Standalone CLI
Handle backwards compatibility for `content` theme from JS configs
Try to canonicalize any arbitrary utility to a bare value
Fix source map generation during when watching files on the CLI
Improve compatibility with special default values in JS configs
Handle `future` and `experimental` config keys during upgrade
Don’t unconditionally convert config keys to `kebab-case`
v3: Don’t break `sibling-*()` functions when used inside `calc(…)`
perf(vite): add plugin hook filter
Include filename and line numbers in CSS parse errors
Fix validation of `source(…)` paths
Release v4.1.17
Substitute `@variant` inside utilities
Remove unused `crossbeam` dependency in oxide
Skip comments in Ruby files when checking for class names
Release 4.1.16
Fix incorrect colors used in pseudo-element
Improve canonicalization for `& > :pseudo` and `& :pseudo` arbitrary variants
Fix canonicalization of arbitrary variants with attribute selectors
Discard candidates with an empty data type
Improve memory usage during canonicalization
Stop suggesting legacy utilities
Release 4.1.15
Mark `break-words` as deprecated, and upgrade to `wrap-break-word`
Ignore `--tw-` variables during internal signature computation
Revert agentic issue-triage workflow
Remove Oxide postinstall script
Incorporate changes from latest `ignore` crate
Collapse multiple utilities
Update Lightning CSS to 1.30.2
Add `optimize` option to `@tailwindcss/vite` plugin
Fix parsing issue when `\t` is used in at-rules
Generalize the `walk` implementation
Make TypeScript a bit more happy
Don’t index into strings with the `theme(…)` function
Clone AST nodes used in `staticValues`
Canonicalize dimensions
Move modifier of `not-*`, `has-*`, and `in-*` variant to sub variant
Fix resolving colors via `theme(…)` in compat mode with nested objects
Canonicalization constant folding and handling zeros
Suppress warnings when using `:deep`, `:slotted` and `:global`
Improve percentage canonicalization
Fix Safari devtools issues because of nested `@supports` at-rules without normal `rule`
Fix failing integration tests
Improve performance of cloning AST nodes
Introduce `canonicalizeCandidates` on the internal Design System
Add agentic workflow issue-triage
Never publish v3 as `latest` on npm
v3: Bundle postcss-load-config v4 with the standalone CLI
Prepare v3.4.18 release
Prepare v4.1.14 release
Ensure first class inside className in React is migrated
v3: Remove irrelevant utility rules when matching important classes
Show version mismatch when running upgrade tool
Add `Upgrading from Tailwind CSS v…` when running upgrade tool
Support Vite Environment API
use href to get the full path of the file
[JIT] Add support for "raw" purge content
Use `json` preprocessor for new-line delimited JSON files
Canonicalize negative arbitrary values
